title: cervicina gracilis
intro: Cervicina gracilis, also known as Cervicina or Cervicia, is a flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. Cervicina gracilis has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and powder, and is said to offer health benefits like reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system.
